scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:scanner"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend-server && npm install && cd ../admin-employee-portal && npm install && cd ../qr-scanner-site && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd backend-server && npm run build && cd ../admin-employee-portal && npm run build && cd ../qr-scanner-site && npm run build
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd backend-server && npm run initdb
